meta.title: NOTES: Methanolobus taylorii sp. nov., a New Methylotrophic, Estuarine Methanogen
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: Previously published phylogenetic studies of 16S rRNA showed that methylotrophic, slightly halophilic, methanogenic strain GS-16T (T = type strain) represents a new species of bacterium. We propose the name Methanolobus taylorii for this species; strain GS-16 is the type strain.
